tool_args.label: Preliminary Close Subject to Adjustment
tool_args.raw_text: All figures are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current accrual actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
